sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; // Demo data for UI const recommended = [ { id: 1, title: 'Canon EOS R5', price: '₱1,200/day', rating: '4.8', distance: '1.2km' }, { id: 2, title: 'DJI Mavic Air 2', price: '₱1,800/day', rating: '4.9', distance: '2.5km' }, { id: 3, title: 'Camping Tent', price: '₱500/day', rating: '4.5', distance: '0.8km' }, { id: 4, title: 'Projector', price: '₱800/day', rating: '4.7', distance: '1.5km' }, ]; const nearby = [ { id: 1, title: 'Party Sound System', price: '₱2,500/day', rating: '4.8 (12)', location: '2.1km away' }, ]; const featured = [ { id: 1, title: 'Sony A7 III Camera', price: '₱1,500/day', rating: '4.8', location: 'Makati City' }, { id: 2, title: 'Professional Drone', price: '₱2,000/day', rating: '4.9', location: 'Taguig City' }, { id: 3, title: 'Camping Equipment Set', price: '₱800/day', rating: '4.6', location: 'Quezon City' }, { id: 4, title: 'Wedding Gown', price: '₱3,500/day', rating: '4.7', location: 'Pasig City' }, ]; const categories = [ { name: 'Electronics', icon: }, { name: 'Tools', icon: }, { name: 'Furniture', icon: }, { name: 'Clothing', icon: }, { name: 'Events', icon: }, ]; function Home() { return (

))}
{/* How It Works */}

How RenThing Works

1. Find What You Need

Browse thousands of items available for rent in your area

2. Book & Pay Securely

Choose your dates and pay through our secure payment system

3. Enjoy & Return

Pick up or get it delivered, use it, then return when done

); } export default Home;
